description_long: This is a large, round wall clock with a black, gear-themed frame and openwork design. The face features oversized, gold-colored Arabic numerals arranged around the perimeter, with three red hands for hours, minutes, and seconds. The center of the clock is decorated with interlocking, gold-toned gears, giving it a mechanical, industrial aesthetic. The back of the clock reveals a battery compartment and mounting hardware, indicating it is powered by a standard clock mechanism. The clock is relatively thin, with a flat profile suitable for wall mounting. Its bold, decorative style makes it a striking visual element in any setting.
description: A large, round wall clock with a black frame, gold gears, and oversized gold Arabic numerals, featuring red hands and an openwork design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the black frame, gold gears, large gold Arabic numerals, and red clock hands.
description_view_1: Side profile revealing the clock's thin, flat structure and minimal depth.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the battery compartment, mounting hardware, and the back of the gear design.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile, again highlighting the clock's slimness and flatness.
attribute_face_design: Round openwork face with large gold Arabic numerals and decorative gold gears in the center.
